examples.title: Apriori Algorithm
examples.description: Frequent itemset discovery using level-wise approach
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Apriori
BEGIN
  1. L1 = {frequent 1-itemsets}
  2. FOR (k=2; Lk-1 ≠ ∅; k++)
  3.   Ck = GenerateCandidates(Lk-1)
  4.   FOR EACH transaction t ∈ D
  5.     Ct = subset(Ck, t)
  6.     FOR EACH candidate c ∈ Ct
  7.       c.count++
  8.   Lk = {c ∈ Ck | c.count ≥ min_sup}
  9. RETURN ∪Lk
END
examples.explanation: Iteratively generates candidates and prunes using support threshold
